message:
test: add 9 new integration test suites for gate modules and existing engine subsystems

Adds integration test coverage for both new gate modules and previously
untested existing engine subsystems.

Gate module integration tests (3 suites):
- benchmark_freshness_gate_integration: freshness window enforcement,
  stale-evidence rejection, re-measurement trigger validation
- causal_uplift_evidence_gate_integration: A/B evidence parsing,
  statistical significance thresholds, insufficient-evidence rejection
- descent_certificate_gate_integration: convergence certificate
  validation, divergence detection, budget-exceeded rejection

Existing subsystem integration tests (6 suites):
- calibration_sentinel_integration: sentinel calibration lifecycle,
  threshold adjustment, drift detection across security epochs
- callback_stdlib_dispatch_integration: dispatch strategy selection,
  stack depth enforcement, overhead multiplier computation, trace building
- counterfactual_intervention_planner_integration: intervention plan
  generation, causal graph traversal, effect size estimation
- nitrosketch_telemetry_integration: sketch update thinning, site budget
  enforcement, sampling strategy selection, snapshot emission
- obstruction_witness_emitter_integration: witness generation for
  concurrent obstruction, progress certificate validation
- react_package_cohort_integration: cohort assignment, package grouping,
  version compatibility matrix, build target selection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
